lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. The mechanical systems require major repairs to be fully operational.

Step into perfection with this absolutely stunning vehicle! It is in truly pristine, showroom condition, looking and driving just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. Meticulously cared for and kept in flawless shape, this car is a rare find for anyone seeking the very best quality. It’s a beautiful, like-new ride that’s ready for its next proud owner!

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition. The exterior paint is flawless with a showroom shine, and the interior remains in immaculate shape with no signs of wear. Mechanically, it performs perfectly, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a car that looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the interior and exterior. Major repairs are required for it to be fully functional.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows its age with some paint fading on the hood and a few minor scratches and dings around the body. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows visible wear on the seats and carpets. While the car starts and runs well, it will eventually need some routine maintenance, including new brake pads soon. This is a budget-friendly option for someone looking for a functional vehicle that is honest about its wear and tear.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle exhibits a commendable standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by reliability and sophistication. A premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber asset that balances enduring quality with exceptional value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable set of wheels that’s ready for its next big adventure? This car has been such a joy to own and is still in really solid shape for all your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs smoothly and has been well-cared for, making it a perfect pick if you want something dependable and fun to drive. I’m super excited for someone else to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have!

Available is a mechanically sorted E46 M3 powered by the high-strung S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. This unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The suspension geometry remains true with refreshed control arm bushings, ensuring the communicative steering and balanced chassis dynamics synonymous with the M-badge. A purpose-built driver’s car ready for the apex.
Used vehicle in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

Experience the perfect balance of performance and reliability with this meticulously maintained vehicle. Finished in a timeless metallic coat that retains its deep luster, the exterior shows only the minor signs of careful use expected of a well-loved car. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating and a suite of modern tech including a premium audio system and intuitive navigation. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has been serviced regularly, with a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection just completed. It drives straight, shifts smoothly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. With a clean title in hand and a detailed history of care, this is a dependable choice for anyone seeking quality without the new-car price tag. Ready for its next owner to drive home today.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced combination of performance and long-term value. It has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our dealership's high standards for reliability and roadworthiness. Experience the confidence of a vehicle that has been cared for with precision and is prepared for immediate delivery.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience suitable for the discerning professional. Every component has been vetted to ensure sustained operational integrity, reflecting a standard of care that distinguishes this offering from its peers. This is an exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved over the years. Whether you need a dependable daily driver or something for those fun weekend adventures, this car is totally ready to hit the road with you. It runs smooth and looks great—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, the drivetrain remains robust with recent VANOS servicing and valve adjustments. The chassis retains its factory-spec rigidity, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings. Equipped with a variable M-differential and MacPherson strut front/multi-link rear suspension, the handling remains sharp and communicative. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals are sound, ensuring a visceral driving experience for the discerning purist.
Well-maintained vehicle. Good condition. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Title in hand. Ready for sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, stylish daily driver. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the interior remains exceptionally clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it is in solid shape, having undergone regular servicing with all maintenance records available for your review. It drives smoothly, shifts precisely, and offers the peace of mind that comes from a well-cared-for machine. This is a complete package for a buyer looking for a dependable, high-quality vehicle that is ready for the road today.

This meticulously maintained vehicle exemplifies a balance of performance and reliability. Featuring a well-preserved exterior and a clean, functional interior, it has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity. A premier choice for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated to meet the demands of the sophisticated driver. It exhibits a commendable state of preservation, reflecting a history of diligent ownership and comprehensive maintenance. Engineered for sustained performance, this selection offers an optimal synthesis of reliability and prestige. We invite you to experience a vehicle that stands as a testament to enduring quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for all your road trips and daily commutes. It’s super reliable and runs like a charm! I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m looking for someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!
Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its high-revving
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Title ready for transfer.

This vehicle strikes a perfect balance between daily utility and refined care. The exterior paint presents beautifully, showcasing a deep shine with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Step inside to a cabin that feels remarkably fresh; the upholstery is well-preserved, all electronic features function as intended, and the interior remains a clean, non-smoking environment. Under the hood, the car has been maintained with a strict adherence to service schedules, resulting in a smooth, responsive drive and confidence-inspiring handling. It comes equipped with a solid set of tires and a comprehensive history of its upkeep. This is a reliable, attractive choice for a buyer who values a car that has been treated with genuine respect and is ready for the road ahead.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This well-maintained example offers a refined driving experience, balancing sophisticated aesthetics with mechanical integrity. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromising on performance or style.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances performance with enduring value. This unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and has been preserved to meet rigorous standards of presentation and functionality. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure with you! Everything runs smoothly, and it’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I’ve taken great care of it, so you’re getting a fantastic car that’s ready to hit the road immediately. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, the mechanical engagement is peerless. The chassis remains taut with recent bushing replacements, and the subframe has been proactively reinforced. While showing signs of respectful use, the engine pulls strongly with consistent compression across all cylinders, and the VANOS system has been professionally serviced. It’s a mechanically sound, high-performance machine ready for the apex.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the interior remains clean, smoke-free, and comfortable with supple upholstery. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced at regular intervals, ensuring a reliable and responsive driving experience. All electronic features and climate controls are fully functional. It is a solid, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without the need for any urgent repairs.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an optimal balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected by our certified technicians, this unit exhibits strong mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. It offers a dependable driving experience without compromising on the prestige associated with the marque. A definitive choice for those who prioritize long-term reliability and professional-grade maintenance standards.
